name: ai-ding
description: Cross-platform notifications for Claude Code — desktop, sound, Telegram, Bark, Slack, email, and more. Works over SSH with progressive fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Send attention-grabbing notifications from Claude Code
interface.longDescription: ai-ding adds desktop, sound, and remote-friendly notifications to Claude Code, with contextual hook handling for completed turns, questions, plan approval, permission prompts, and API errors.
defaultPrompt: Install ai-ding so I stop missing Claude notifications.
Use notify to tell me when this task is finished.
